title: InverseEnchantX
description: Adds 20+ Unique Vanilla-Friendly Enchantments to Enhance Your Minecraft Gameplay
body:
# InverseEnchantsX 
InverseEnchantsX adds 20 powerful and balanced custom enchantments to Minecraft 1.21+. Includes combat, armor, and tool enchants like Life Steal, Bleeding, Speed Boost, Vein Miner, Telepathy, and Timber. Features a clean /enchants menu, enchant books, villager support, and full survival compatibility. Perfect for SMPs, PvP servers, and RPG-style gameplay.

## Enchantment List:

• Life Steal (I–III)

Heal yourself every time you hit a mob or player.
Higher levels restore more health, letting you sustain during tough fights.

• Bleeding (I–III)

Adds bonus damage on hit and inflicts a poison-like effect.
Each level increases both damage and the strength of the bleed effect.

• Withering (I)

Applies a Wither effect for a few seconds, draining enemy health over time.

• Frost Aspect (I)

Slows enemies you hit, making them easier to chase or escape from.

• Beheading (I–III)

Adds a chance for mobs to drop their heads when killed. Higher levels increase the drop rate.

• Experience (I–III)

Earn extra XP from kills.
Level scaling gives significantly more XP with each upgrade.

• End Slayer (I)

Deal extra damage to End mobs including Endermen, Shulkers, and the Ender Dragon.

• Sword Breach (I)

Allows swords to partially ignore armor, dealing more damage.

• Axe Breach (I)

Same effect as Sword Breach, but exclusive to axes for high-burst combat.

Vitality (I–III)

Grants extra hearts when worn.
The higher the level, the more bonus health you receive.

• Agility (I–III)

Chance to dodge incoming attacks entirely.
Each level improves the dodge rate.

• Tank (I)

Flat damage reduction, making you more resistant in all combat situations.

• Speed Boost (I–III)

Adds permanent Speed effects while wearing boots.
Higher levels = faster movement.

• Night Owl (I)

Gives you full Night Vision while wearing a helmet.

• Lavawalker (I)

Walk safely on lava by turning lava beneath your feet into basalt temporarily.

• Aura Damage (I–II)

When enemies hit you, they have a chance to catch fire.
Higher levels increase the ignition chance.

• Magnetic (I–II)

Pulls nearby dropped items toward you automatically.
Bigger range with higher levels.

• Vein Miner (I)

Breaks entire ore veins at once, up to a set block limit, making mining faster and more rewarding.

• Melting (I)

Auto-smelts ores into ingots directly and puts them into your inventory.

• Timber (I)

Chop one log and the whole tree falls instantly.
Perfect for large farms or fast resource gathering.

• Telepathy (I)

Any blocks you break—or mobs you kill—send their drops straight to your inventory.
No more item clutter.

## How Players Use These Enchantments

A clean GUI opens showing all 20 enchant books. Click to receive one instantly.

Apply Using Anvils : Combine your item with the enchant book like a normal Minecraft enchant.

Use Commands (Admins & OPs)

```
/ienchant <player> <enchant> <level>
```
Works for giving enchants directly to held items.

Villager Trading : Villagers may sell these enchant books, allowing survival-friendly progression.
